title: Senior Architect
description: We are looking for an experienced Senior Architect to lead the design and planning of our premium residential and commercial projects in Jolshiri Abashon and beyond.
responsibilities: Lead architectural design from concept through construction documentation
Coordinate with structural, MEP, and interior design teams
Ensure compliance with RAJUK building codes and BNBC standards
Review and approve detailed drawings and specifications
Mentor junior architects and review their work
Present design proposals to clients and regulatory authorities
requirements: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Architecture from a recognized university
8+ years of experience in residential and commercial architecture
Registered with the Institute of Architects Bangladesh (IAB)
Proficiency in AutoCAD, Revit, SketchUp, and rendering software
Strong knowledge of Bangladesh building codes and regulations
Excellent communication and leadership skills

title: Structural Engineer
description: We are seeking a skilled Structural Engineer to design and oversee the construction of safe, durable, and cost-effective structures for our real estate developments.
responsibilities: Design structural systems for RCC and steel-framed buildings
Perform structural analysis and load calculations
Prepare detailed structural drawings and bar bending schedules
Conduct site inspections to ensure construction quality
Coordinate with architects and MEP engineers
Review soil investigation reports and recommend foundation systems
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Civil/Structural Engineering
5+ years of experience in building structural design
Proficiency in ETABS, SAP2000, SAFE, and AutoCAD
Registered with the Bangladesh Engineering Council
Experience with high-rise residential buildings preferred
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

title: Sales Manager — Real Estate
description: We are looking for a dynamic Sales Manager to lead our real estate sales team and drive revenue growth across our premium property portfolio.
responsibilities: Lead and manage the real estate sales team to achieve targets
Develop and implement sales strategies for new project launches
Build and maintain relationships with high-net-worth clients
Conduct property presentations and site visits for prospective buyers
Track sales performance and prepare regular reports for management
Train and mentor junior sales associates
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Business, Marketing, or related field
6+ years of real estate sales experience, with 2+ years in management
Proven track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets
Excellent negotiation and communication skills
Strong network in the Dhaka real estate market
Proficiency in CRM software and Microsoft Office

title: Interior Designer
description: We are seeking a creative Interior Designer to join our in-house design team and deliver exceptional interior spaces for our luxury residential and commercial projects.
responsibilities: Develop interior design concepts and mood boards for client presentations
Prepare detailed drawings, 3D renders, and material specifications
Select furniture, fixtures, finishes, and accessories
Coordinate with contractors and vendors during execution
Conduct site visits to ensure design intent is maintained
Stay updated on design trends and new materials
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Interior Design or Architecture
3+ years of professional interior design experience
Proficiency in AutoCAD, SketchUp, 3ds Max, and Adobe Creative Suite
Strong portfolio demonstrating residential and commercial projects
Knowledge of local material sources and vendors
Excellent visual and verbal communication skills

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description: We are looking for a Digital Marketing Specialist to manage our online presence, run campaigns, and generate qualified leads for our real estate projects.
responsibilities: Plan and execute digital marketing campaigns across Meta, Google, and LinkedIn
Manage social media content calendar and community engagement
Create compelling ad copy, landing pages, and marketing collateral
Track and report on campaign performance metrics (ROI, CPA, CTR)
Optimize website SEO and manage Google Business Profile
Coordinate with external agencies and content creators
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or related field
3+ years of digital marketing experience, preferably in real estate
Proficiency in Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, and Google Analytics
Experience with email marketing platforms (Mailchimp, HubSpot)
Strong copywriting skills in both English and Bengali
Data-driven mindset with excellent analytical abilities

title: Project Coordinator — Construction
description: We are seeking a highly organized Project Coordinator to support our construction project managers and ensure smooth project execution.
responsibilities: Assist project managers in planning, scheduling, and monitoring construction activities
Prepare and maintain project documentation, including progress reports
Coordinate with subcontractors, suppliers, and site teams
Track project budgets, expenses, and material procurement
Schedule and document project meetings and site inspections
Ensure health and safety compliance on construction sites
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering, Construction Management, or related field
2+ years of experience in construction project coordination
Familiarity with project management software (MS Project, Primavera)
Knowledge of Bangladesh construction practices and regulations
Strong organizational and multitasking abilities
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

title: HR & Administration Executive
description: We are looking for an HR & Administration Executive to handle recruitment, employee relations, and office administration for our growing team.
responsibilities: Manage end-to-end recruitment and onboarding processes
Maintain employee records, contracts, and HR documentation
Coordinate training and professional development programs
Handle office administration, vendor management, and facilities
Ensure compliance with Bangladesh labor laws
Organize team events and employee engagement activities
requirements: Bachelor's degree in HRM, Business Administration, or related field
3+ years of experience in HR and administration
Knowledge of Bangladesh Labor Act and compliance requirements
Proficiency in Microsoft Office and HRIS systems
Strong interpersonal and conflict resolution skills
Excellent English and Bengali communication skills
